raw: Each promo code use provides up to two adults and four youths (7–17) with $15 admission (general and special exhibition) per person. Tickets to the MFA are always free for visitors under seven years old. This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have made a reservation. BRING THIS PASS TO THE ADMISSIONS DESK (either printed or on your device) at the museum to have the discount applied.
